narrative:
Strongsville-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 968 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
